title: senecio capitatus subsp. pyrenaicus
intro: Senecio capitatus subsp. pyrenaicus, also known as Pyrenean ragwort or Pyrenean groundsel, is a subspecies of Senecio capitatus, a flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Senecio capitatus subsp. pyrenaicus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support immune function. Traditionally, this plant has been used to make herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity and the need for proper dosing and preparation.
